/usr/bin/cc    CMakeFiles/MyTest.dir/src/Main.c.o CMakeFiles/MyTest.dir/src/native.c.o CMakeFiles/MyTest.dir/src/optimization.c.o CMakeFiles/MyTest.dir/src/test_sgemm.c.o  -o ../bin/MyTest  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kun/spack/opt/spack/linux-x86_64_v4/amdblis-5.2-7c4ickkpixrejjmg4j7x44csmdh4ucma/lib /home/kun/spack/opt/spack/linux-x86_64_v4/amdblis-5.2-7c4ickkpixrejjmg4j7x44csmdh4ucma/lib/libblis.so -lm -lpthread /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/9/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.so
